name: Noob
description:
"Anything going on?"

Noob got a Christmas gift, which ended up being a Sixer plush. They liked it, so they decided to chill with the plush with no pants on. That's cool.

ON EVERYONE'S SOUL WE ARE GIVING NOOB THE DUKE DENIS HUG

Art by a fella named INKubis on Twitter

"They don't understand the things I say on Twitter."

Random thing I wanna say, but I Can't Wait To Get There is my favorite song off of Hurry Up Tomorrow.

TAGS: ROBLOX, FORSAKEN, ROBLOXIAN, ROBLOXIANS, ROBLOXIA, NOOB, SURVIVOR USER, SURVIVOR POV, NON-BINARY BUT THEY ARE PACKING A COCK JUST SO YOU KNOW.
creator: _LATE_AT_NIGHT_
